Areas of Focus

What I Build

🖥️

Desktop Applications

Native desktop experiences utilizing Electron, system-level APIs, multi-threading, and offline-first data synchronization structures.

ElectronNode.jsFFmpegIPC Router
🌐

Web Applications

Full-stack client-server React web apps built with real-time web socket connections, 3D WebGL scenes, and server-side operations.

ReactNext.jsThree.jsWebSockets
⚙️

Developer Utilities

Command-line tools, local compilation shells, custom scripts, and build tools designed to automate tedious deployment paths.

Node ScriptsPythonCLI ToolingGit Hooks
Selected Work

Live Project Index

🎙️
WEB/APP

VoiceWave

Real-time voice chat app that works directly in your browser. No account needed, no downloads — just share a room link and start talking instantly.

  • 🎙️ Crystal-Clear Voice Calls
  • 🔒 Password Protected Rooms
  • 💬 Built-in Text Chat & Emoji
  • 🎵 Soundboard with 10+ Sounds
LaunchSpecs →
🎵
APP

We Plays

Premium glassmorphic desktop music player with a built-in visualizer, synchronized lyrics, custom playlist management, and automatic ID3 metadata fetching.

  • 🎨 Dynamic Album Art Theme Engine
  • 🎤 Synchronized Lyrics & Insights
  • 🎛️ Custom Playlist & Queue Manager
  • 🏷️ Automatic ID3 Metadata Fetching
LaunchSpecs →
📄
SITE

JustPDFCraft

Browser-based client-side PDF utility toolkit to merge, split, compress, watermark, protect, and annotate documents locally.

  • 📄 Free PDF & Student Tools
  • 🔒 100% Secure Client-Side Processing
  • 🛠️ Merge, Split & Compress Functionality
LaunchSpecs →
⬇️
APP

SnapGrab

Desktop media downloader app that lets you download videos and audio from 1,000+ platforms. Supports playlist downloads, built-in playback, and stays up to date automatically.

  • ⬇️ Downloader for 1,000+ Platforms
  • 📂 Playlist & Batch Downloads
  • ⚡ Background Component Auto-Updates
  • 📻 Built-in Media Playback Shell
LaunchSpecs →
⚡

Powered by a modern stack, obsessed with performance.
